title: Cherry Pickup Two Robots
hints: Since both robots move down one row per step, they are always on the same row index. Focus on their column positions.
Define a state by the current row and the column of each robot. The answer is the maximum value reachable at the bottom row.
The state value is the max cherries collected so far. If robots share a cell, count its cherries only once. Base case is the starting positions.
